name: Savory Tomato Bread Puddings
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (14.5 ounce) stewed tomatoes including liquid
8 slices of homemade-style white bread, cut into 3/4-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a small saucepan, simmer tomatoes, brown sugar, Worcestershire sauce, and cayenne for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. In a bowl, drizzle butter over the bread squares and toss to coat evenly.
4. Divide the bread squares between four 1-cup soufflé dishes or custard cups.
5. Top each serving with a quarter of the tomato mixture.
6. Bake the tomato puddings in the middle of the oven for 20 minutes.
Yield: 4 servings
